headline: FirstEnergy Working Nonstop to Restore Power After Windstorm
summary: Less than 24 hours after winds exceeding 70 mph tore through Ohio, Pennsylvania, West Virginia and Maryland, power has been restored to nearly 478,000 of the approximately 655,400 FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) customers who lost power following Friday's storm. FirstEnergy crews supported by outside personnel are working around the clock to restore service to all impacted customers.

headline: A Look At FirstEnergy (FE) Valuation After New Grid Investments And Five Year Capital Plan
summary: Why FirstEnergy’s fresh grid investments are in focus FirstEnergy (FE) has moved back into the spotlight after outlining almost $655 million of new transmission work in Ohio and Pennsylvania, alongside a wider $36 billion, five year capital investment plan. See our latest analysis for FirstEnergy. At a share price of US$51.16, FirstEnergy has seen momentum build, with a 30 day share price return of 6.7% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.7% alongside its fresh grid investment...

headline: FirstEnergy (FE) Price Target Increased by BofA on Peer Multiple Expansion
summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 5, BofA analyst Ross Fowler raised the firm’s price recommendation on FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE) to $52 from $49. The firm reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The analyst cited a higher peer-group valuation multiple as the reason […]
